headline: Documentation eats 30% of your work week
primary_text:
40% of clinicians report burnout from paperwork alone — not from the emotional weight of sessions, but from the hours of documentation that follow.

You already know this. You're living it. Spending 15+ hours per week on notes isn't sustainable, and it's taking time away from the work that actually matters.

JotPsych saves clinicians 1-2 hours of documentation time every day with AI-powered notes from session recordings. HIPAA-compliant for behavioral health. Your clinical judgment, just documented faster.
